title: Codebase Enrichment Output
description: Extends extraction.schema.json with LLM-generated semantic fields. Produced by Stage 2 enrichment pipeline. Each Symbol gains description, module_identity, complexity, is_entrypoint, architectural_role, and tags; the module gains module_description, module_category, key_types, and key_functions.

module_description.description: 1-3 sentence description of the module's purpose and responsibilities

module_category.description: What kind of module this is

key_types.description: The 1-5 most important type/class names in this module

key_functions.description: The 1-5 most important function names in this module

enricher_model.description: Model ID used for enrichment (e.g., claude-sonnet-4-6)

description.description: Human-readable 1-2 sentence description of what this symbol does
examples: Validates Task() invocations against routing schema, blocking opus-tier calls and wrong subagent_types

module_identity.description: Role of this symbol within its module. core=primary business logic; helper=utility used by core, not meaningful alone; glue=connects modules (adapters, wrappers, converters); config=configuration loading/constants/defaults; test=test code; generated=auto-generated code

complexity.description: Cognitive complexity assessment. low=<10 lines, linear flow, obvious purpose; medium=10-50 lines, branching/loops, requires reading to understand; high=>50 lines, complex state/concurrency/non-obvious algorithms

is_entrypoint.description: Whether this symbol is a primary entry point (main, handler, exported API surface)

architectural_role.description: Architectural pattern this symbol implements. Use 'none' if no pattern applies.
